title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services!
